metadata.description: Official Aionima plugin marketplace — default plugin catalog for Aionima gateways

plugins.name: agi-lemonade-runtime
plugins.description: Local AI server with NPU/GPU/CPU auto-routing. Installs Lemonade + FastFlowLM, signs the amdxdna DKMS module with a MOK for Secure Boot, adds the amd_iommu=force_isolation kernel flag needed for SVA binding on Strix-class NPUs, and registers Settings + system service + 4 Aion agent tools (lemonade_status/models/pull/load) that proxy through AGI's /api/lemonade/* routes.

plugins.name: agi-mysql
plugins.description: MariaDB database service for projects

plugins.name: agi-node-runtime
plugins.description: Node.js runtime versions for project hosting

plugins.name: agi-claw-bridge
plugins.description: Bridge OpenClaw agents into the AGI dashboard

plugins.name: agi-tynn-pm
plugins.description: Tynn-the-service as a marketplace plugin — full MCP-backed PM experience plus future Kanban MApp. Tynn-lite stays baked-in as the file-based fallback; tynn-pm is the upgrade path.

plugins.name: agi-chrome-devtools-mcp
plugins.description: Chrome DevTools for Agents (chrome-devtools-mcp) — MCP server template that registers Google's official Chrome DevTools MCP server in the per-project MCP-tab dropdown. Provides agent tools for performance traces, network inspection, screenshots, console messages, and Puppeteer-driven browser automation.

plugins.name: agi-plaid-api
plugins.description: Plaid API consumer plugin — links bank accounts via Plaid Link, fetches transactions and balances, verifies account holder identity. Registers 4 agent tools (plaid:list-accounts / fetch-transactions / get-balance / identity-verify) for use by the Accounting Ledger / Budget Tracker / Expense Reports MApps and any other tool consumer. Phase 1 scaffold today; Plaid Link OAuth + real API calls + TPM2 sealing in Phase 2-4.
